analysis.reasoning: Core message: A Chinese diplomat thanks someone and states that Europe and China often misunderstand each other; diplomats should find common interests, bridge communication gaps, and promote peace and cooperation; he will continue efforts. Evaluation: CH1 (West immoral/hostile): Not present; no criticism of the West, only acknowledgment of mutual misunderstanding. CH2 (China is a benevolent power): Yes; it highlights diplomacy, promoting peace and cooperation, and bridging understanding—portraying China’s role as cooperative and peace-oriented internationally. CH3 (epic history): Not referenced. CH4 (appropriate political system/values domestically): Not addressed; no mention of China’s political system or domestic values. CH5 (CCP government succeeds): Not claimed; no boasting of achievements or governance outcomes. CH6 (culture/nature/heritage): Not relevant. Conclusion: The tweet promotes CH2.
